title: crassocephalum diversifolium var. crepidioides
intro: Crassocephalum diversifolium var. crepidioides, also known as the African land snail's food plant, is a type of plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, commonly found in West Africa. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective against various health issues. The health benefits of Crassocephalum diversifolium var. crepidioides include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential use in wound healing and as a natural remedy for digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve making teas, infusions, or decoctions from its leaves, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
